abilities.description: When you make a move to lie, bluff, steal, or cheat, add +1.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.ironswornmoves.4244b77103f55bc4]{Gather Information} by investigating a devious scheme, you may roll +shadow (instead of +wits). If you do, take +2 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.141aec8b92efd14b]{Develop Your Relationship} through the use of fabricated stories, false pretenses, or half-truths, take +2 momentum or mark progress. Then give this connection a special mark. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.8704c945023355fb]{Test Your Relationship} with a marked connection, roll +shadow (instead of +heart) and a weak hit now counts as a miss.
